name: Kindly Web Search MCP Server
what_it_does: Kindly Web Search MCP server providing AI agents with web search capabilities — querying search engines (DuckDuckGo or Bing) and returning relevant search results with snippets and URLs, enabling agents to access current web information beyond their training data.
use_cases: Searching the web for current information from research agents
Finding recent news and events from information-gathering agents
Verifying facts with current web sources from fact-checking agents
Discovering relevant URLs for further content extraction agents
Privacy-first web search via DuckDuckGo from privacy-conscious agents
Simple web search without requiring Brave or Google API keys
not_for: Deep content extraction (this returns search results, not page content)
High-volume search at scale (rate limits apply)
Searches requiring Google-quality result ranking (DuckDuckGo has different coverage)
best_when: An agent needs simple web search without registering for Brave or Google APIs — DuckDuckGo search works without an API key for basic use.
avoid_when: You need comprehensive web coverage or content extraction — use Web Scout MCP or Firecrawl for deeper results.

auth.notes: No API key required for DuckDuckGo search. Optional Bing Search API key for Bing backend. DuckDuckGo search works out of the box.

pricing.free_tier_limits: DuckDuckGo: free (unofficial); Bing Search API: 1,000 req/month free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Bing Search API: $7/1,000 requests beyond free tier
pricing.notes: Community MCP is free. DuckDuckGo backend requires no API key. Bing backend is optional with API key.

performance.rate_limits: DuckDuckGo: informal rate limits; Bing: 1,000 req/month free

known_agent_gotchas: DuckDuckGo unofficial API may break without notice — no formal API agreement
Search result quality is lower than Google or Bing for niche queries
DuckDuckGo rate limits are informal and not documented
Search results only — no content extraction, agents need follow-up tool calls
For production use, prefer Brave Search or Bing with official API keys
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced for search queries. DuckDuckGo is privacy-respecting. Community MCP. No API key = no revocation capability.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Privacy-respecting DDG. Community MCP. No API key revocation.
